title: $:/plugins/linonetwo/source-control-management
author: LinOnetwo
name: History version source control management on TidGi Desk
description: Use TidGi's API to view history of tid
readme:
<$button class="tc-btn-invisible" style="overflow: hidden;white-space: pre;width: 100%;" message="tm-open-external-window" param="https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/tiddlywiki-plugins/tree/master/plugins/linonetwo/source-control-management">{{$:/core/images/github}} <$text text="https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/tiddlywiki-plugins/tree/master/plugins/linonetwo/source-control-management"/></$button>

!! Features

This plugin integrates with [ext[TidGi-Desktop|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TidGi-Desktop/]]'s Git version history features, allowing you to:

# Search and browse Git commit history
# View changed files in each commit
# Inspect historical file content
# Restore previous versions of tiddlers

!! Requirements

* Requires [ext[TidGi-Desktop|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TidGi-Desktop/]] version 0.13.0 or higher
* Works with Git-backed wikis only

!! Usage

Open the "History" tab in the sidebar to:

# Search Commits: Enter keywords to search commit messages
# Browse History: View the list of commits with author and date
# Inspect Changes: Click on a commit to see changed files
# View Content: Click on a file to see its content at that point in time
# Restore Version: Use the "Apply This Version" button to restore historical content (requires confirmation)

The historical file content is stored in a temporary tiddler and can be opened in the story river for easy editing or copying.
